articles.title_en: Muradov: The West will “live with its bones” to prevent trade between Crimea and Africa
articles.lead_en: The permanent representative of the region to the President of the Russian Federation emphasized that due to its geopolitical position, the peninsula is a strategically advantageous region for establishing economic ties between Russia and the countries of Africa, the Middle East
